title: myosotis sylvatica var. lithospermifolia
intro: Myosotis sylvatica var. lithospermifolia, also known as Wood Forget-me-not, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the borage family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is also believed to have health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. Wood Forget-me-not can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
